title: system-copilot pseudo-employee + role card
predecessor: M33-T1 shipped 2026-04-16, commit 0a77d87 (migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo + 15 unit tests)
goal: Add the second is_system=1 pseudo-employee per company alongside M31's system-agent. Create role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md (role_id: system-copilot, level: system, tools_allowed: M31 read-only set + query_copilot_insights, tools_denied includes write-side tools — guards the analyzer from accidentally invoking decompose_project / delegate_subtask / review_deliverable). Extend the ensureSystemAgent bootstrap module with ensureSystemCopilot(companyId): EmployeeId — idempotent SELECT-then-INSERT, mirrors ensureSystemAgent shape. Extract isSystemRoleId(roleId): boolean predicate to packages/shared-types so the system-role identity check has one source of truth (replaces magic-string SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID checks scattered across employees / orgchart / hire / delegation paths). Filter sweep: employees.list, orgchart.get, hire dialog role catalog, delegation picker, meeting attendees — every surface that hides system-agent must also hide system-copilot. The is_system filter already does most of the work; this T2 hardens it with the role_id predicate so a future is_system=0 system role still gets filtered.
acceptance: role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md exists with full frontmatter (id, name, level: system, reports_to: null, manages: [], preferred_model_tier, preferred_providers, fallback_providers, tools_allowed: 6 read-only + query_copilot_insights, tools_denied: write-side tool names, decision_authority, kpis, output_format, temperature, license, author, version) + body sections per CLAUDE.md role-pack standard
isSystemRoleId(roleId): boolean predicate exported from packages/shared-types with constants for SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID, +1 unit test

ensureSystemCopilot(db, companyId, options): EmployeeId added to apps/desktop/src/main/services/system-agent-bootstrap.ts (or sibling system-copilot-bootstrap.ts) — idempotent, called from seedIfEmpty + companies.create, +1 unit test

Filter sweep verified — employees.list / orgchart.get / hire dialog / delegation picker / meeting attendees all exclude system-copilot, +2 unit tests (one for repo-level filter via isSystemRoleId, one for ensureSystemCopilot calling SELECT-first idempotency)
+4 unit tests net (1033 → 1048 baseline at M33 T1 → 1052 target)
Lint clean (0 errors, ≤24 warnings — within M33 budget of ≤34)
Typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages
Atomic commit: feat(m33): M33 T2 — system-copilot pseudo-employee + role card
Ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T2 — commit ledger (<sha>)
filesTouched: packages/shared-types/src/system-roles.ts (NEW or extend) — isSystemRoleId predicate + constants
apps/desktop/src/main/db/repos/employees.ts (replace magic-string filter with isSystemRoleId where applicable; the is_system column filter remains primary)
Test files: shared-types unit test for predicate, bootstrap unit test for idempotency
notes: T2 mirrors M31 T0's system-agent bootstrap pattern. Reuse ensureSystemAgent's idempotency + filter-sweep posture. Don't duplicate the is_system column logic — extend it with the role_id predicate so the analyzer can distinguish copilot from agent without an extra column.

isSystemRoleId predicate is the single-source-of-truth replacement for the ad-hoc role_id === 'system-agent' checks scattered across employees.ts, orgchart.ts, hire pickers, delegation pickers. M31 T2 noted this in Handoff notes — 'M33 T2 extracts this'.

Tool registry for system-copilot: M31 read-only set (query_employees / query_tickets / query_projects / query_meetings / query_vault / query_events) + query_copilot_insights (T6 ships the tool, T2 just declares the role's allowance). tools_denied lists the write-side tools so the analyzer is locked out of mutations even if the LLM hallucinates one.
Reuse the ABI rebuild dance for any T2 unit-test verification: better-sqlite3 + keytar via node-gyp; pnpm rebuild is a no-op.
